args:
Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Core API Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/hono-base.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/client/client.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Core API Read/Write Ledger

## src/index.ts
- Public surface: Exports Hono class and type aliases (Env, Handler, Context, types)
- Internal names noticed: Hono, context.ts, types.ts, request.ts, client/, utils/
- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts, context.ts, request.ts, client/, types.ts
- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that re-exports the Hono framework and all its type definitions
- Copy-safe detail: Exports Hono class, type exports from types/context/request/client for typed API usage

## src/types.ts
- Public surface: Defines Env, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, RouterRoute, Schema, Context types
- Internal names noticed: HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, ToSchema, TypedResponse, ValidationTargets, Input, ResponseFormat, MergePath, ExtractParams
- Imports or neighbors: context.ts, hono-base.ts, utils/headers.ts, utils/http-status.ts, utils/types.ts
- Plain-English summary: Contains all type definitions for Hono including handlers, routes, schemas, and typed response formats
- Copy-safe detail: 1045+ lines of TypeScript interface/type definitions supporting typed routing and validation

## src/hono.ts
- Public surface: Hono class that extends HonoBase with default router configuration
- Internal names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, HonoBase
- Imports or neighbors: hono-base.ts, router/reg-exp-router.ts, router/smart-router.ts, router/trie-router.ts, types.ts
- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class constructor that defaults to SmartRouter with RegExp and Trie routers
- Copy-safe detail: Wraps HonoBase with optional router choice, constructor initializes with SmartRouter by default

## src/hono-base.ts
- Public surface: Handler, Post, Put, Delete, Options, Patch, All, On, Use methods; fetch, request, basePath, route, mount, onError, notFound
- Internal names noticed: Hono, compose, Context, Router, METHODS, NOT_FOUND, ERROR_HANDLER, getPath, mergePath
- Imports or neighbors: compose.ts, context.ts, router/, types.ts, utils/url.ts, utils/constants.ts
- Plain-English summary: Base Hono implementation with method chaining, routing, error handling, middleware support
- Copy-safe detail: 168 lines of core routing and request handling logic with router delegation

## src/context.ts
- Public surface: Context class with req, res, event, executionCtx, header, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound, set, get, var
- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, FetchEventLike, ExecutionContext, Renderer, Layout, DefaultRenderer, ContextOptions
- Imports or neighbors: request.ts, types.ts, utils/html.ts, utils/http-status.ts, utils/mime.ts, utils/types.ts
- Plain-English summary: Request context holding environment, response state, and providing response builders
- Copy-safe detail: Manages request lifecycle, response creation, variables storage, and rendering helpers

## src/request.ts
- Public surface: HonoRequest class with param, query, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, blob, formData, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath
- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, parseBody, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, HonoRequest, ValidationTargets
- Imports or neighbors: http-exception.ts, router/, types.ts, utils/body.ts, utils/url.ts, utils/headers.ts
- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper for path params, query strings, headers, and body parsing with caching
- Copy-safe detail: 125 lines handling param extraction, body caching, query/header access, request cloning

## src/request/constants.ts
- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol export
- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
- Imports or neighbors: request.ts
- Plain-English summary: Symbol constant for accessing router match results via bracket notation
- Copy-safe detail: Single symbol export used as bracket property access on HonoRequest

## src/utils/body.ts
- Public surface: parseBody function with all, dot options for multipart/urlencoded form parsing
- Internal names noticed: BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
- Imports or neighbors: request.ts
- Plain-English summary: Parses form-data and urlencoded bodies with nested object and array support via dot/all options
- Copy-safe detail: 122 lines of FormData parsing logic with dot-notation and multi-value field handling

## src/compose.ts
- Public surface: compose function accepting middleware array and optional error/notFound handlers
- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, dispatch
- Imports or neighbors: context.ts, types.ts
- Plain-English summary: Koa-inspired middleware composition combining handlers into single function
- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines implementing dispatch loop for middleware execution with error propagation

## src/http-exception.ts
- Public surface: HTTPException class extending Error with status and res properties
- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode, HTTPExceptionOptions, getResponse
- Imports or neighbors: utils/http-status.ts
- Plain-English summary: HTTP error thrown when authentication or fatal error occurs, includes response option
- Copy-safe detail: 33 lines implementing status codes and response generation for throw-based error handling

## src/client/index.ts
- Public surface: hc function, parseResponse, DetailedError, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientRequestOptions

- Plain-English summary: HTTP client SDK entry point with hc function for building typed API clients
- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports hc proxy factory, response parser, and client type inference utilities

## src/client/client.ts
- Public surface: hc proxy factory, ClientRequestImpl fetch method, Client, ClientResponse, InferRequestType, InferResponseType
- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestOptions, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, TypedURL, HonoURL, PathToChain, ExpandAllMethod, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, PickResponseByStatusCode
- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts, hono-base.ts, types.ts, utils/types.ts, utils/http-status.ts
- Plain-English summary: hc proxy-based client factory enabling chainable API calls with type inference
- Copy-safe detail: 270+ lines implementing proxy pattern for declarative API client with URL building and fetch delegation

## src/client/types.ts
- Public surface: Client, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferEndpointType, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, PickResponseByStatusCode, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
- Internal names noticed: ExpandAllMethod, BuildPath, BuildPathname, HonoURL, TypedURL, ResponseFormat, KnownResponseFormat, StatusCode, BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, ClientRequestOptions

## src/client/utils.ts
- Public surface: parseResponse, hc, DetailedError, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
- Internal names noticed: ClientResponse, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ObjectType

- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for URL building, param replacement, and response parsing
- Copy-safe detail: 80 lines of string manipulation, URL building, deep merge, and client response type filtering

## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType, jsonRegex
- Imports or neighbors: client.ts
- Plain-English response parsing. Throws DetailedError on non-OK responses
- Plain-English summary: Response parser detecting JSON/text content-type and throwing structured errors on failures
- Copy-safe detail: 50 lines implementing content-type detection and structured error throwing for client SDK

## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
- Public surface: fire, handle functions for Service Worker adapter
- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, Schema, FetchEvent, HandleOptions
- Imports or neighbors: handler.ts, types.ts, hono.ts, types.ts
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter setting up addEventListener('fetch') for Hono apps
- Copy-safe detail: 18 lines wrapping app.fetch call inside event listener with fetch event API

## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
- Public surface: handle function returning FetchEvent handler
- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, Fetch, Hono, Env, Schema
- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts, types.ts
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker fetch handler delegating to app.fetch with respondWith wrapper
- Copy-safe detail: 19 lines implementing respondWith wrapper around Hono fetch with 404 fallback

## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
- Public surface: FetchEvent interface extending ExtendableEvent with clientId, request, respondWith
- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent, FetchEvent, clientId, handled, preloadResponse
- Imports or neighbors: none
- Plain-English summary: TypeScript type definitions for Service Worker FetchEvent interface
- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines defining FetchEvent interface with required service worker properties
